title: Match query capability implemented
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:22-36 search_matches tool with team, opponent, competition, season, date range filters

title: Team statistics and win/loss records
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:51-63 team_stats tool; internal/soccer/queries.go implements TeamStats()

title: Player search by name, nationality, club
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:78-91 search_players tool with name, nationality, club, position, min_overall filters

title: League standings calculation
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:65-76 standings tool; TestStandings2019Champion verifies 2019 champion calculation

title: Statistical analysis across all data files
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go:93-103 competition_stats tool; internal/soccer/loader.go loads all 6 CSV files

title: Team name normalization
evidence: internal/soccer/normalize.go implements NormalizeTeamName and TeamKey; TestNormalizeTeamName passes

title: Date format handling
evidence: internal/soccer/format.go:ParseDate handles ISO, Brazilian, and datetime formats; TestParseDateFormats passes

title: MCP protocol implementation
evidence: internal/mcp/protocol.go:28-35 Initialize/Result message handling; TestInitializeHandshake passes

title: Data loading from all 6 CSV files
evidence: internal/soccer/loader.go:LoadGraph loads Brasileirao, Copa do Brasil, Libertadores, BR-Football-Dataset, novo_campeonato_brasileiro, fifa_data; TestDataIsLoaded confirms 5 datasets loaded
